name: Addition of Data Structure Sentinel
description: The product allows the accidental addition of a sentinel value (such as a null terminator) into a data structure, corrupting its boundaries. This can cause serious logic problems including premature data truncation or incorrect parsing.
detection_pattern: An INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing sentinel characters that flows into a STORAGE node or TRANSFORM node operating on sentinel-delimited data without a TRANSFORM[sanitize] mediator that strips or escapes sentinel values.
